question: List all the artists name in the database.
How many genres are there?
nl_response: There are 25 genres in the database.

question: Count the number of customers located in the USA.
sql_generated: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Customer" c WHERE c.Country ILIKE '%USA%';

question: Find all invoices for the customer with ID 1.
nl_response: The user asked the following question: "Find all invoices for the customer with ID 1."
sql_generated: SELECT * FROM Invoice i WHERE i.CustomerId = 1;

question: List each album title along with the artist's name.
sql_generated: SELECT a."Title", ar."Name" AS "Artist Name" FROM "Album" a JOIN "Artist" ar ON a."ArtistId" = ar."ArtistId";

question: How many tracks belong to the 'Rock' genre?
nl_response: There are 1297 tracks in the 'Rock' genre.
sql_generated: SELECT COUNT(t.TrackId) AS number_of_tracks FROM "Track" t JOIN "Genre" g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId WHERE g.Name = 'Rock';

question: Show the total revenue generated from each country.
sql_generated: SELECT c.country_name, SUM(i.total) AS total_revenue FROM "Invoice" i JOIN "Customer" c ON i.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.country_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC NULLS LAST;

question: Find the total number of items sold for each media type.
sql_generated: SELECT m.name AS media_type, COUNT(*) AS total_items_sold FROM "MediaType" m JOIN "Sales" s ON m.media_type_id = s.media_type_id GROUP BY m.name;

question: List the first and last names of all employees who are Sales Support Agents.
sql_generated: SELECT e.first_name, e.last_name FROM "Employee" e WHERE e.title = 'Sales Support Agent';

question: List the top 5 customers who have spent the most money in total.
sql_generated: SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, SUM(oi.productid * oi.quantity) AS total_spent FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid JOIN orderitems oi ON o.orderid = oi.orderid GROUP BY c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Which artist has the most tracks in the database? Give the name and count.
nl_response: The artist with the most tracks in the database is "The Beatles" with 52 tracks.

question: Which genres have more than 100 tracks? List the genre name and count.
nl_response: The database returned more than 5 rows, so I will provide a brief summary sentence.
sql_generated: SELECT g.name, COUNT(t.trackid) AS COUNT FROM genre g JOIN track t ON g.genreid = t.genreid GROUP BY g.name HAVING COUNT(t.trackid) > 100 ORDER BY COUNT DESC NULLS LAST;

question: Calculate the average track length in seconds for each genre.
sql_generated: SELECT g.Name, AVG(t.Milliseconds / 1000)) AS AverageDuration FROM Track t JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId GROUP BY g.Name ORDER BY AverageDuration DESC NULLS LAST;

question: Identify the artist who has earned the most revenue from customers in Canada.
sql_generated: SELECT a."Name" FROM "Artist" a JOIN "Album" al ON a."ArtistId" = al."AlbumArtistId" WHERE al."AlbumCountry" = 'Canada' ORDER BY a."Name" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1;
